Chapter 1
Opening with ordinary prose.

The research is clear [Smith 2020] and the replication held [Jones et al. 2019].

A quoted passage may carry an editorial marker [sic] without implying a template stub.

Some editions note [emphasis added] where the original lacked italics.

Footnote-style references like [12] are reader-facing, not assembly placeholders.

This chapter does not use bracketed hook stubs or unfilled pipeline placeholder tokens.
